meta.user_prompt: A fantasy story about a young mage saving her village

story.title: The Young Mage's Quest
story.summary: In a small village on the edge of a mystical forest, a young mage named Eira must use her magical abilities to save her home from a dark sorcerer's evil plans.

visual_profile.appearance: tall, slender, with long brown hair
visual_profile.clothing: a white robe with a silver crescent moon emblem

visual_profile.appearance: tall, muscular, with short black hair
visual_profile.clothing: a black robe with a crimson emblem

scenes.title: The Village in Peril
scenes.visual_description: A small village surrounded by a dense forest, with smoke rising from the chimneys of the thatched roof cottages.

dialogues.text: What's happening, Lila? Why is everyone so scared?
Eira, my child, the dark sorcerer Malakai has returned, and he seeks to destroy our village.

scenes.title: The Mage's Training
scenes.visual_description: A young Eira practicing her magic in a secluded clearing, surrounded by candles and ancient tomes.

dialogues.text: I've been practicing for months, but I still feel so uncertain.
Patience, Eira. Your power will grow with time and practice.

scenes.title: The Dark Sorcerer's Return
scenes.visual_description: Malakai standing in the village square, surrounded by his dark minions, as Eira watches from a distance.

dialogues.text: Fools! You think you can defeat me? I will crush this village and everyone in it!
I won't let you, Malakai. I'll stop you, no matter what it takes.
